2605.10171.title: When Reviews Disagree: Fine-Grained Contradiction Analysis in Scientific Peer Reviews
2605.10171.paper_summary: Scientific peer reviews frequently contain conflicting expert judgments, and the increasing scale of conference submissions makes it challenging for Area Chairs and editors to reliably identify and interpret such disagreements. Existing approaches typically frame reviewer disagreement as binary contradiction detection over isolated sentence pairs, abstracting away the review-level context and obscuring differences in the severity of evaluative conflict. In this work, we introduce a fine-grained formulation of reviewer contradiction analysis that operates over full peer reviews by explicitly identifying contradiction evidence spans and assigning graded disagreement intensity scores. To support this task, we present RevCI, an expert-annotated benchmark of peer-review pairs with evidence-level contradiction annotations with graded intensity labels. We further propose IMPACT, a structured multi-agent framework that integrates aspect-conditioned evidence extraction, deliberative reasoning, and adjudication to model reviewer contradictions and their intensity. To support efficient deployment, we distill IMPACT into TIDE, a small language model that predicts contradiction evidence and intensity in a single forward pass. Experimental results show that IMPACT substantially outperforms strong single-agent and generic multi-agent baselines in both evidence identification and intensity agreement, while TIDE achieves competitive performance at significantly lower inference cost.
2605.10171.paper_summary_zh: 科學同行評審經常包含相互矛盾的專家判斷，而會議提交的規模不斷增加，使得區域主席和編輯難以可靠地識別和解釋這些分歧。現有的方法通常將評審者的分歧框架化為孤立句子對的二元矛盾檢測，忽略了評審層級的背景，並掩蓋了評估衝突嚴重性之間的差異。在這項工作中，我們引入了一種細粒度的評審者矛盾分析公式，該公式在完整的同行評審中運作，通過明確識別矛盾證據範圍並分配分級的分歧強度分數來進行。為了支持這項任務，我們提出了RevCI，一個專家註釋的同行評審對基準，具有證據級別的矛盾註釋和分級強度標籤。我們進一步提出IMPACT，一個結構化的多代理框架，整合了基於方面的證據提取、深思熟慮的推理和裁決，以建模評審者的矛盾及其強度。為了支持高效部署，我們將IMPACT提煉為TIDE，一個小型語言模型，能在單次前向傳播中預測矛盾證據和強度。實驗結果顯示，IMPACT在證據識別和強度一致性方面顯著超越了強大的單代理和通用多代理基準，而TIDE則在顯著較低的推理成本下實現了競爭性的性能。
2605.10171.author: Sandeep Kumar et.al.
2605.10171.authors: Sandeep Kumar, Yash Kamdar, Abid Hossain, Bharti Kumari, Tanik Saikh, Asif Ekbal
